front.title: PSI AI Agent Action Sealing and Liability Protocol

author.organization: Apex Intelligence Empire / ROCKYFILMS888 PTY LTD

abstract.t: This document specifies a cryptographic protocol for sealing AI agent actions, establishing an auditable chain of custody from instruction to execution. As AI agents increasingly perform autonomous actions — financial transfers, content publication, system configuration, legal filings — the need for a verifiable record of "who instructed what, when, and what actually happened" becomes critical for liability attribution, regulatory compliance, and trust. The PSI Agent Se
